title: Require Grit Helper Comments
forbids: a named predicate, function, or pattern declaration in the canonical first line-delimited Grit fence without a directly preceding non-empty // intent comment
why: Named Grit helpers encode policy relations that are otherwise easy to mistake for parser mechanics, so each declaration must carry an adjacent intent surface; review owns whether the prose is substantively useful.
remediate: Add one concise non-empty // comment immediately above every named predicate, function, or pattern declaration in the canonical first Grit fence, describing the relation or decision the helper encodes.
message: Named Grit helpers require directly preceding intent comments.
